results.question: Give the code of the airport with the least flights.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT airports.AirportCode
FROM airports
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT SourceAirport AS Code FROM flights
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DestAirport AS Code FROM flights
) AS flight_airports ON airports.AirportCode = flight_airports.Code
GROUP BY airports.AirportCode
ORDER BY COUNT(flight_airports.Code) ASC
LIMIT 1;
results.gold_sql: SELECT T1.AirportCode FROM AIRPORTS AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.AirportCode  =  T2.DestAirport OR T1.AirportCode  =  T2.SourceAirport GROUP BY T1.AirportCode ORDER BY count(*) LIMIT 1

results.question: Find number of pets owned by students who are older than 20.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Has_Pet 
JOIN Student ON Has_Pet.StuID = Student.StuID 
WHERE Student.Age > 20;
results.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM student AS T1 JOIN has_pet AS T2 ON T1.stuid  =  T2.stuid WHERE T1.age  >  20

results.question: On average, when were the transcripts printed?
results.generated_sql: SELECT AVG(strftime('%s', transcript_date)) AS avg_transcript_timestamp FROM Transcripts;
results.gold_sql: SELECT avg(transcript_date) FROM Transcripts

results.question: What are the distinct battle names which are between bulgarian commander 'Kaloyan' and latin commander 'Baldwin I'?
results.generated_sql: SELECT DISTINCT name FROM battle WHERE bulgarian_commander = 'Kaloyan' AND latin_commander = 'Baldwin I';
results.gold_sql: SELECT name FROM battle WHERE bulgarian_commander  =  'Kaloyan' AND latin_commander  =  'Baldwin I'

results.question: List the first and last name of all players who are left / L hand in the order of birth date.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT first_name, last_name
FROM players
WHERE hand = 'L'
ORDER BY birth_date;
results.gold_sql: SELECT first_name ,  last_name FROM players WHERE hand  =  'L' ORDER BY birth_date

results.question: Find the name of the shops that do not hire any employee.
results.generated_sql: SELECT Name FROM shop WHERE Shop_ID NOT IN (SELECT Shop_ID FROM hiring);
results.gold_sql: SELECT name FROM shop WHERE shop_id NOT IN (SELECT shop_id FROM hiring)

results.question: How many flights arriving in Aberdeen city?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM flights 
JOIN airports ON flights.DestAirport = airports.AirportCode 
WHERE airports.City = 'Aberdeen';
results.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM FLIGHTS AS T1 JOIN AIRPORTS AS T2 ON T1.DestAirport  =  T2.AirportCode WHERE T2.City  =  "Aberdeen"

results.question: What are the ids and names of all countries that either have more than 3 car makers or produce fiat model ?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT c.CountryId, c.CountryName
FROM countries c
LEFT JOIN car_makers cm ON c.CountryId = cm.Country
LEFT JOIN model_list ml ON cm.Id = ml.Maker
LEFT JOIN car_makers cm_fiat ON cm_fiat.Id = ml.Maker AND cm_fiat.FullName LIKE '%fiat%'
GROUP BY c.CountryId, c.CountryName
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT cm.Id) > 3 OR SUM(CASE WHEN ml.Model IS NOT NULL AND cm_fiat.FullName LIKE '%fiat%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0;
results.gold_sql: select t1.countryid ,  t1.countryname from countries as t1 join car_makers as t2 on t1.countryid  =  t2.country group by t1.countryid having count(*)  >  3 union select t1.countryid ,  t1.countryname from countries as t1 join car_makers as t2 on t1.countryid  =  t2.country join model_list as t3 on t2.id  =  t3.maker where t3.model  =  'fiat';

results.question: Show the names and grades of each high schooler.
results.generated_sql: SELECT name, grade FROM Highschooler;
results.gold_sql: SELECT name ,  grade FROM Highschooler

results.question: Find the first name and age of students who have a dog but do not have a cat as a pet.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT S.Fname, S.Age
FROM Student S
JOIN Has_Pet HP ON S.StuID = HP.StuID
JOIN Pets P ON HP.PetID = P.PetID
WHERE P.PetType = 'dog'
AND S.StuID NOT IN (
    SELECT HP2.StuID
    FROM Has_Pet HP2
    JOIN Pets P2 ON HP2.PetID = P2.PetID
    WHERE P2.PetType = 'cat'
)
results.gold_sql: SELECT T1.fname ,  T1.age FROM student AS T1 JOIN has_pet AS T2 ON T1.stuid  =  T2.stuid JOIN pets AS T3 ON T3.petid  =  T2.petid WHERE T3.pettype  =  'dog' AND T1.stuid NOT IN (SELECT T1.stuid FROM student AS T1 JOIN has_pet AS T2 ON T1.stuid  =  T2.stuid JOIN pets AS T3 ON T3.petid  =  T2.petid WHERE T3.pettype  =  'cat')

results.question: Find the major and age of students who do not have a cat pet.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT Major, Age
FROM Student
WHERE StuID NOT IN (
    SELECT StuID
    FROM Has_Pet
    JOIN Pets ON Has_Pet.PetID = Pets.PetID
    WHERE PetType = 'cat'
)
results.gold_sql: SELECT major ,  age FROM student WHERE stuid NOT IN (SELECT T1.stuid FROM student AS T1 JOIN has_pet AS T2 ON T1.stuid  =  T2.stuid JOIN pets AS T3 ON T3.petid  =  T2.petid WHERE T3.pettype  =  'cat')

results.question: How many flights do we have?
results.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS NumberOfFlights FROM flights;
results.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM FLIGHTS

results.question: List the names of all winners who played in both 2013 and 2016.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT winner_name
FROM matches
WHERE year = 2013
AND winner_name IN (
    SELECT winner_name
    FROM matches
    WHERE year = 2016
);
results.gold_sql: SELECT winner_name FROM matches WHERE YEAR  =  2013 INTERSECT SELECT winner_name FROM matches WHERE YEAR  =  2016

results.question: What is the code of the country with the most players?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT country_code
FROM players
GROUP BY country_code
ORDER BY COUNT(player_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;
results.gold_sql: SELECT country_code FROM players GROUP BY country_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: How many dog pets are raised by female students?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Has_Pet hp
JOIN Pets p ON hp.PetID = p.PetID
JOIN Student s ON hp.StuID = s.StuID
WHERE p.PetType = 'dog' AND s.Sex = 'F';
results.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM student AS T1 JOIN has_pet AS T2 ON T1.stuid  =  T2.stuid JOIN pets AS T3 ON T2.petid  =  T3.petid WHERE T1.sex  =  'F' AND T3.pettype  =  'dog'

results.question: Show names of teachers that teach at least two courses.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT t.Name
FROM teacher t
JOIN course_arrange ca ON t.Teacher_ID = ca.Teacher_ID
GROUP BY t.Teacher_ID, t.Name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ca.Course_ID) >= 2;
results.gold_sql: SELECT T2.Name FROM course_arrange AS T1 JOIN teacher AS T2 ON T1.Teacher_ID  =  T2.Teacher_ID GROUP BY T2.Name HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  2

results.question: Count the number of orchestras that have CD or DVD as their record format.
results.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orchestra WHERE Major_Record_Format IN ('CD', 'DVD');
results.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orchestra WHERE Major_Record_Format  =  "CD" OR Major_Record_Format  =  "DVD"

results.question: What are the country code and first name of the players who won in both tourney WTA Championships and Australian Open?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.country_code, p.first_name
FROM players p
JOIN matches m ON p.player_id = m.winner_id
WHERE m.tourney_name IN ('WTA Championships', 'Australian Open')
GROUP BY p.player_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT m.tourney_name) = 2;
results.gold_sql: SELECT T1.country_code ,  T1.first_name FROM players AS T1 JOIN matches AS T2 ON T1.player_id  =  T2.winner_id WHERE T2.tourney_name  =  'WTA Championships' INTERSECT SELECT T1.country_code ,  T1.first_name FROM players AS T1 JOIN matches AS T2 ON T1.player_id  =  T2.winner_id WHERE T2.tourney_name  =  'Australian Open'

results.question: Find the states where both owners and professionals live.
results.gold_sql: SELECT state FROM Owners INTERSECT SELECT state FROM Professionals

results.question: What is the last transcript release date?
results.generated_sql: SELECT MAX(transcript_date) AS last_transcript_release_date FROM Transcripts;
results.gold_sql: SELECT transcript_date FROM Transcripts ORDER BY transcript_date DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: What are all the song names by singers who are older than average?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT Song_Name
FROM singer
WHERE Age > (SELECT AVG(Age) FROM singer)
results.gold_sql: SELECT song_name FROM singer WHERE age  >  (SELECT avg(age) FROM singer)

results.question: Count the number of templates of the type CV.
results.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM Templates WHERE template_type_code  =  "CV"

results.question: What are the names and grades for each high schooler?
results.generated_sql: SELECT name, grade FROM Highschooler;
results.gold_sql: SELECT name ,  grade FROM Highschooler

results.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS number_of_votes FROM VOTES WHERE state IN ('NY', 'CA');
results.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM votes WHERE state  =  'NY' OR state  =  'CA'

results.question: Count the number of templates.
results.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Template_Count FROM Templates;
results.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM Templates

results.question: What is the best rank of losers across all matches?
results.generated_sql: SELECT MIN(loser_rank) AS best_loser_rank FROM matches WHERE loser_rank IS NOT NULL;
results.gold_sql: SELECT min(loser_rank) FROM matches

results.question: List the vote ids, phone numbers and states of all votes.
results.generated_sql: SELECT vote_id, phone_number, state FROM VOTES;
results.gold_sql: SELECT vote_id ,  phone_number ,  state FROM votes

results.question: How many airports do we have?
results.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM airports;
results.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM AIRPORTS

results.question: What are the country codes for countries that do not speak English?
results.generated_sql: SELECT Code FROM country WHERE Code NOT IN (SELECT CountryCode FROM countrylanguage WHERE Language = 'English');
results.gold_sql: SELECT CountryCode FROM countrylanguage EXCEPT SELECT CountryCode FROM countrylanguage WHERE LANGUAGE  =  "English"

results.question: Give the city and country for the Alton airport.
results.generated_sql: SELECT City, Country FROM airports WHERE AirportName = 'Alton';
results.gold_sql: SELECT City ,  Country FROM AIRPORTS WHERE AirportName  =  "Alton"

results.question: How many different forms of governments are there in Africa?
results.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT GovernmentForm) FROM country WHERE Continent = 'Africa';
results.gold_sql: SELECT count(DISTINCT GovernmentForm) FROM country WHERE Continent  =  "Africa"

results.question: How many countries have a republic as their form of government?
results.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM country WHERE GovernmentForm LIKE '%Republic%';
results.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM country WHERE GovernmentForm  =  "Republic"

results.question: Which student has enrolled for the most times in any program? List the id, first name, middle name, last name, the number of enrollments and student id.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.middle_name, s.last_name, COUNT(se.student_enrolment_id) AS enrollment_count
FROM Students s
JOIN Student_Enrolment se ON s.student_id = se.student_id
GROUP BY s.student_id
ORDER BY enrollment_count DESC
LIMIT 1;
results.gold_sql: SELECT T1.student_id ,  T1.first_name ,  T1.middle_name ,  T1.last_name ,  count(*) ,  T1.student_id FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Student_Enrolment AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id GROUP BY T1.student_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: What is the number of continents?
results.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS NumberOfContinents FROM continents;
results.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM CONTINENTS;

results.question: Which owner has paid the largest amount of money in total for their dogs? Show the owner id and zip code.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT o.owner_id, o.zip_code
FROM Owners o
JOIN Dogs d ON o.owner_id = d.owner_id
JOIN Treatments t ON d.dog_id = t.dog_id
GROUP BY o.owner_id, o.zip_code
ORDER BY SUM(t.cost_of_treatment) DESC
LIMIT 1;
results.gold_sql: SELECT T1.owner_id ,  T1.zip_code FROM Owners AS T1 JOIN Dogs AS T2 ON T1.owner_id  =  T2.owner_id JOIN Treatments AS T3 ON T2.dog_id  =  T3.dog_id GROUP BY T1.owner_id ORDER BY sum(T3.cost_of_treatment) DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Find the number of flights landing in the city of Aberdeen or Abilene.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM flights 
JOIN airports ON flights.DestAirport = airports.AirportCode 
WHERE airports.City IN ('Aberdeen', 'Abilene');
results.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM Flights AS T1 JOIN Airports AS T2 ON T1.DestAirport  =  T2.AirportCode WHERE T2.city  =  "Aberdeen" OR T2.city  =  "Abilene"

results.question: Which African countries have a smaller population than that of any country in Asia?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT Name 
FROM country 
WHERE Continent = 'Africa' 
AND Population < (SELECT MIN(Population) FROM country WHERE Continent = 'Asia');
results.gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM country WHERE Continent  =  "Africa"  AND population  <  (SELECT min(population) FROM country WHERE Continent  =  "Asia")

results.question: How many countries has more than 2 car makers ?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM (
  SELECT Country 
  FROM car_makers 
  GROUP BY Country 
  HAVING COUNT(Id) > 2
) AS subquery;
results.gold_sql: select count(*) from countries as t1 join car_makers as t2 on t1.countryid  =  t2.country group by t1.countryid having count(*)  >  2

results.question: What is the content of the series Sky Radio?
results.generated_sql: SELECT Content FROM TV_Channel WHERE series_name = 'Sky Radio';
results.gold_sql: SELECT Content FROM TV_Channel WHERE series_name = "Sky Radio";

results.question: What is name of the country that speaks the largest number of languages?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT country.Name
FROM country
JOIN countrylanguage ON country.Code = countrylanguage.CountryCode
GROUP BY country.Code
ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT countrylanguage.Language) DESC
LIMIT 1;
results.gold_sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code  =  T2.CountryCode GROUP BY T1.Name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Show different hometown of teachers and the number of teachers from each hometown.
results.generated_sql: SELECT Hometown, COUNT(*) AS Number_of_Teachers FROM teacher GROUP BY Hometown;
results.gold_sql: SELECT Hometown ,  COUNT(*) FROM teacher GROUP BY Hometown

results.question: What model has the most different versions?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT Model
FROM car_names
GROUP BY Model
ORDER BY COUNT(MakeId) DESC
LIMIT 1;
results.gold_sql: SELECT Model FROM CAR_NAMES GROUP BY Model ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

results.question: How many models does each car maker produce? List maker full name, id and the number.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT cm.Id, cm.FullName, COUNT(cl.Model) AS ModelCount
FROM car_makers cm
LEFT JOIN model_list cl ON cm.Id = cl.Maker
GROUP BY cm.Id, cm.FullName;
results.gold_sql: SELECT T1.FullName ,  T1.Id ,  count(*) FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker GROUP BY T1.Id;

results.question: What is the name of the winner with the most rank points who participated in the Australian Open tournament?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT winner_name 
FROM matches 
WHERE tourney_name = 'Australian Open' 
ORDER BY winner_rank_points DESC 
LIMIT 1;
results.gold_sql: SELECT winner_name FROM matches WHERE tourney_name  =  'Australian Open' ORDER BY winner_rank_points DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: What is the name and directors of all the cartoons that are ordered by air date?
results.generated_sql: SELECT Title, Directed_by FROM Cartoon ORDER BY Original_air_date;
results.gold_sql: SELECT title ,  Directed_by FROM Cartoon ORDER BY Original_air_date

results.question: How many cars has over 6 cylinders?
results.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cars_data WHERE Cylinders > 6;
results.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CARS_DATA WHERE Cylinders  >  6;

results.question: Count the number of flights into ATO.
results.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM flights WHERE DestAirport = 'ATO';
results.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM FLIGHTS WHERE DestAirport  =  "ATO"

results.question: Which professional did not operate any treatment on dogs? List the professional's id, role and email.
results.gold_sql: SELECT professional_id ,  role_code ,  email_address FROM Professionals EXCEPT SELECT T1.professional_id ,  T1.role_code ,  T1.email_address FROM Professionals AS T1 JOIN Treatments AS T2 ON T1.professional_id  =  T2.professional_id

results.question: Give the names of nations that speak both English and French.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT c.Name
FROM country c
JOIN countrylanguage cl1 ON c.Code = cl1.CountryCode AND cl1.Language = 'English'
JOIN countrylanguage cl2 ON c.Code = cl2.CountryCode AND cl2.Language = 'French';
results.gold_sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code  =  T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Language  =  "English" INTERSECT SELECT T1.Name FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code  =  T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Language  =  "French"

results.question: Show all template type codes with less than three templates.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT Template_Type_Code
FROM Templates
GROUP BY Template_Type_Code
HAVING COUNT(*) < 3;
results.gold_sql: SELECT template_type_code FROM Templates GROUP BY template_type_code HAVING count(*)  <  3
